join_order.notes: Use sub_adsh_pk_hash LUT domain to map adsh->filtered_sub_idx and aggregate by filtered index

data_structures.aggregation: thread_local direct_array(filtered_sub_cardinality) then compact_hash_map rollup for (name,cik) and cik

indexes.purpose: prune sub blocks and materialize fy=2022 filtered rows
define dense adsh code domain and constant-time adsh->row lookup
get USD rowids directly and avoid scanning non-USD fact rows

optimization_notes: Root cause is that iter_0 still performs too much per-row hot-path work: a full 39.4M-row fact loop plus two hash-map updates for each qualifying row. Strategy Category C (work elimination) with cache-fit array aggregation: drive scan from the USD posting list so only USD rowids are touched, map adsh codes through a dense filtered-index array, accumulate into thread-local fixed arrays keyed by filtered sub rows, and defer hash aggregation to a small post-scan rollup over filtered rows; this removes one entire per-row aggregation path and replaces random hash updates with contiguous array writes while preserving exact query semantics.
